name: Backend Authentication & Authorization
description: 后端认证授权:登录会话、权限与访问控制

detector.inline: profile.code_domains.some(d=>['backend_auth','authz','authn','session','permissions'].includes(d)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s=>/\b(authorization|authentication|access control|rbac|abac|permission check|session fixation|jwt validation|oauth callback|token scope|privilege escalation|idor)\b/i.test(s)) ? 0.9 : 0
